news.headline: Ark Invest bought $6.05M worth of Robinhood shares and sold Zoom stock as Bitcoin rebounds.
news.summary: Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, made significant trades on Thursday by buying 341,432 shares of Robinhood Markets Inc (HOOD) and selling Zoom Video Communications Inc (ZM). The decision to purchase Robinhood came after the platform exceeded revenue expectations in the second quarter. The investment was made through ARK Fintech Innovation ETF (ARKF), ARK Next Generation Internet ETF (ARKW), and ARK Innovation ETF (ARKK) at a total value of approximately $6.05 million based on the latest closing price of $17.73. This move by Wood comes amidst a period where she has been increasing her holdings in Robinhood.

news.headline: Israel to Send Negotiation Team for Framework Pact on August 15
Israel PM Office Responds to US Mediators' Proposal

Cryptocurrency market rebounds, Bitcoin +9.57% ($61,177.40), Ethereum +11.47% ($2,665.47), Dogecoin +9.93% ($0.1066). Expecting ETH to hit $2.9K mark. Liquidations worth $229M, traders losing $168M. Bitcoin Open Interest +5.53%, Ethereum funds locked +6%.
news.summary: On Thursday, the cryptocurrency market saw a significant surge, recovering from recent losses. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) experienced a gain of +9.57%, reaching $61,177.40, with a peak of $62,500 during the late hours. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) also saw a rally of +11.47% to $2,665.47, briefly hitting $2,700. Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) surged by +9.93%, hitting $0.1066. This turnaround erased Monday's losses when Bitcoin dropped below $50,000 for the first time in nearly six months. The market saw over $229 million in liquidations in the past 24 hours, with traders losing $168 million on downside bets. Bitcoin's Open Interest increased by 5.53%, while Ethereum saw a 6% rise in locked funds in the futures market. The Cryptocurrency Fear & Greed Index transitioned from "Extreme Fear" to "Neutral" following this positive shift in the market.

news.headline: Discover futuristic 3D artist Annibale Siconolfi's work, focusing on global issues like climate change and overcrowding.
news.summary: The most recent spotlight by Render Network showcases Annibale Siconolfi, a grant awardee celebrated for his striking 3D artwork delving into topics such as global warming and overpopulation. Dive deeper into his creative journey.

news.headline: New CUDA-Q v0.8 from NVIDIA enhances quantum programming with better state handling, Pauli words, custom units.
news.summary: NVIDIA has released the CUDA-Q v0.8 update aimed at streamlining quantum programming. The update includes improvements in state handling, Pauli words, and custom unitary operations to enhance the programming experience. Users can now benefit from these enhancements for a more efficient quantum programming process.

news.headline: Guidewire India introduces "ElevatEd by Guidewire" scholarship program for female students in engineering.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, Guidewire has introduced the "ElevatEd by Guidewire" scholarship program for engineering students as part of Guidewire Gives Back initiative.

news.headline: Planet 13 Holdings reported a 20.3% revenue growth to $31.1 million in Q2 2024 but saw a net loss increase to $8.1 million, nearly 75% higher.
news.summary: Planet 13 Holdings Inc. (CSE:PLTH) (OTCQX:PLNH) announced a net revenue of $31.1 million in the quarter, showing a 20.3% increase from $25.8 million last year. However, the net loss also saw a significant rise to $8.1 million, marking a nearly 75% year-over-year surge. Co-CEO Larry Scheffler expressed enthusiasm for the second quarter, highlighting the company's strong financial performance and successful implementation of growth strategies. The quarter saw the completion of a crucial acquisition in Florida and the opening of the distinctive DAZED! Consumption Lounge. Financial highlights from Q2 2024 include a gross profit of $15.8 million, up from $11.9 million in the same quarter. The detailed report can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Voyager Acquisition Corp priced $220M IPO (22M units at $10/unit), listing on Nasdaq as "VACHU" on Aug 9, with potential additional 3.3M units.
news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York, on August 8, 2024, Voyager Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: VACHU) disclosed the pricing for its initial public offering of 22,000,000 units at $10.00 each. These units are slated to be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol “VACHU” from August 9, 2024. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and half of a redeemable warrant. Post the commencement of separate trading, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants are anticipated to be listed on Nasdaq as “VACH” and “VACHW” respectively. The underwriters have the option to buy an additional 3,300,000 units within 45 days to cover over-allotments. The closing of this offering is expected to be on August 12, 2024, pending customary closing conditions.

news.headline: Hayashi: PM to Decide Based on Domestic Situation
China's July Producer Prices Decline by 0.8% Year on Year, Beating Estimates by 0.1%
Co-founder of Palantir, Joe Lonsdale, says AI isn't driving instant growth, but could boost productivity in the US services industry.
news.summary: Entrepreneur and tech influencer Joe Lonsdale, known for his roles at Palantir Technologies Inc. (NYSE:PLTR) and 8VC, discussed current market trends and the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on businesses during an appearance on CNBC’s Squawk Box. Lonsdale highlighted Palantir's resilient performance amidst market instability, crediting its success to AI integration. He pondered whether Palantir's accomplishments reflect broader industry shifts. When questioned about AI's potential, Lonsdale acknowledged that immediate growth might not be obvious but stressed the ability of AI to enhance productivity in various U.S. service sectors. This conversation comes amidst concerns regarding major security vulnerabilities in leading browsers like Chrome, Safari, and Firefox, raising alarms about potential hacker intrusion through an 18-year-old security gap in firewalls. Lonsdale's insights and forecasts regarding AI and tech trends signal a dynamic landscape for businesses and industries looking to leverage advanced technologies for growth and efficiency.

news.headline: Hayashi urges PM Kishida to decide on visit to Central Asia
Bitcoin surpasses $62K, marking highest level since Aug. 3; futures traders rush to adjust positions amid 'massive bull hammer'.
news.summary: The value of Bitcoin has exceeded $62,000 for the first time since August 3rd, prompting futures traders to quickly modify their positions.

news.headline: Telecom Argentina S.A. reports final results for Exchange Offer of up to U.S.$200,000,000 in 8.000% Notes due 2026.
news.summary: Telecom Argentina S.A. revealed the Expiration Date outcomes for its Exchange Offer to swap up to $200,000,000 in total principal for its 8.000% Notes due July 18, 2026. The announcement was made in Buenos Aires, Argentina on August 8, 2024.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures rise as market attempts rally; 15 stocks, including Meta and GE, near buy points.
news.summary: Futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average surged on Thursday as part of a new market rally attempt, showing strength but remaining unproven. Meta and General Electric are leading the way for stocks approaching buy points, with Meta in particular leading a group of 15 stocks on the brink of reaching these points. This information was highlighted in a recent post labeled "Dow Jones Futures: Market Rallies, But Must Do This; Meta Leads 15 Stocks Near Buy Points" by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: ADENTRA Q2 2024: Sales $549.5M, EPS $0.74, Adjusted EBITDA $48.5M. Acquired Woolf for $130M. Positive refund potential from U.S Commerce dept.
news.summary: ADENTRA Inc. reported its financial results for Q2 2024 with sales of US$549.5 million, a decrease from the previous year. Earnings per share rose to US$0.74, and Adjusted EBITDA increased to US$48.5 million. The company operates 86 facilities in the US and Canada. Notable highlights include a 130 basis points increase in gross margin percentage to 21.7%, a 81.6% increase in net income to US$17.0 million, and a 5.1% growth in Adjusted EBITDA. ADENTRA raised $73 million through an equity offering and acquired Woolf Distributing Company for US$130 million. The company expects stable Q3 EBITDA, with growth from the inclusion of Woolf's operations. ADENTRA aims to achieve an additional $800 million in acquired revenues by 2028 and sees growth opportunities in the architectural building products market. They emphasize strategic initiatives like global sourcing programs and digital engagement for customer growth. Mr. Peter Bull retired from the Board of Directors, and ADENTRA remains committed to shareholder value with dividend payments and growth strategies.

news.headline: Rep. Comer discusses elections and oversight investigations. Tune in for important updates.
JPMorgan strategizes for BOJ's next move as risks rise; hikes likely complete.
Top things to know for Asia: Five key points to kickstart your day.
Allianz's Mohamed El-Erian criticizes Bank of Japan for soft stance, pushing to reduce risky yen carry trades. BoJ's approach may conflict with domestic economic needs.
news.summary: Mohamed El-Erian, the Chief Economic Advisor at Allianz, has suggested a cautious unwinding of Japan's excessive 'carry trades' in light of recent dovish signals from the Bank of Japan. Expressing concerns on social media platform X, El-Erian pointed out the risks associated with the BoJ's pro-risk strategy. He noted the potential conflict between this approach and Japan's domestic economic concerns, emphasizing the need for a gradual unwinding of such trades. El-Erian recommended avoiding the encouragement of new 'carry trades' and instead focusing on orderly reduction of existing excessive levels. He mentioned a likely clash between BoJ's pro-risk stance, influenced partly by external factors, and Japan's internal economic necessities. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: India's rupee faces pressure as a new red line emerges, signaling challenges ahead. #currency #India #pressure
Trump Jr. and Eric caution crypto community on fake tokens, ensure official Trump project announcement coming. Don't be fooled.
news.summary: Former President Donald Trump's sons, Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump, recently addressed the cryptocurrency community, alerting them to beware of fraudulent tokens posing as those associated with their family. They emphasized that any official Trump-backed project will be announced solely by them. Donald Trump Jr. conveyed gratitude for the community's support but cautioned against counterfeit tokens claiming ties to the Trump family. He confirmed that the authentic project will be disclosed directly by them, ensuring fairness for all participants. Eric Trump supported his brother's stance, advising vigilance against fake tokens. The duo emphasized the need to stay alert for the genuine announcement amidst a backdrop of deceitful tokens.

news.headline: SeaQuest CEO Vince Covino steps down after leading the company since 2012.
news.summary: SeaQuest, a renowned interactive zoo aquarium operator with locations nationwide, has disclosed that Vince Covino, the Founder and CEO, has recently resigned. Covino, who played a pivotal role in steering the organization since its establishment in 2012, has decided to step down from his position.

news.headline: PickUp USA celebrates 4 years in Kansas City with steady growth. Brian Boyer opens new basketball gym in Lee's Summit.
news.summary: In August 2024, in Kansas City, Missouri, Brian Boyer, the ex-head coach of Arkansas State University's women's basketball team, was finishing the building of his basketball gym on NE McBaine Dr in Lee's Summit. Four years prior, Boyer collaborated with PickUp USA Fitness for this project.

news.headline: Slate Office REIT (TSX: SOT.UN) reported Q2 results with 381,595 sq ft of leasing completed; new deals at 2.1% above average rent.
news.summary: In Toronto, Slate Office REIT (TSX: SOT.UN), a reputable owner and operator of premier workplace real estate, released its financial outcomes and notable achievements concerning the second quarter of the fiscal year ending on June 30, 2024. The REIT disclosed that during this period, they successfully leased a total of 381,595 square feet. New lease agreements were finalized at a rate 2.1% higher than the average rent, while renewals were negotiated at a 6.7% increase compared to the existing in-place rent. For further insights, the REIT's Management Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) can be accessed through the provided link.

news.headline: Weyerhaeuser (NYSE: WY) declares $0.20 quarterly cash dividend on common shares, payable on Sept. 13, 2024.
news.summary: On August 8, 2024, Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) declared a quarterly base cash dividend of $0.20 per share for its common stock. The dividend will be paid in cash on September 13, 2024, to shareholders of record.

news.headline: Petrobras sticks with dividend payout after resolving tax case in Brazil.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global economy is projected to grow at a rate of 4.5% in the next year, driven by strong performances in the technology and healthcare sectors. The emerging markets are expected to lead this growth, expanding at a rate of 6.2%, while advanced economies are forecasted to grow at a slower rate of 3.9%. The report also highlighted that the global trade volume is set to increase by 6.5% in the same period. However, uncertainties related to the ongoing trade disputes and geopolitics could pose risks to this optimistic outlook.Overall, the economic outlook appears promising, with robust growth expected in the coming year, although challenges remain.

This update is expected to enhance the overall performance of Celestia and improve user experiences. For more details on the Lemongrass upgrade and its features, refer to the full article.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on August 8, 2024, MedBright AI Investments Inc. (MedBright) disclosed updates following a review by the British Columbia Securities Commission. news.headline: Palantir stock soars 11% post deal to supply AI to US defense, intel agencies in partnership with Microsoft.
news.summary: Palantir's stock price rose following their collaboration with Microsoft to provide AI services to the US intelligence community. The deal marks a significant development for Palantir, as they continue to expand their reach in the intelligence sector. The exact financial terms of the agreement were not disclosed, but the partnership signifies a strategic move for both companies to leverage their expertise in AI technology. This news has generated positive investor sentiment, resulting in a boost in Palantir's market value.

news.headline: Cyclospora lawyer probes Wake County outbreak - 134 cases reported since May; herbs and vegetables are suspected.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, a Cyclospora Outbreak is currently being investigated by National Cyclospora Lawyer Jory Lange. Wake County Health Department has documented 134 cases of cyclosporiasis since May. The outbreak is linked to the consumption of herbs and vegetables, according to their findings.

news.summary: David Muir and Linsey Davis will host the candidates' inaugural in-person debate since Kamala Harris joined the race.

news.headline: Trump proposes giving presidents power to influence Federal Reserve's interest rate decisions, challenging independence.
news.summary: In a recent press conference in Palm Beach, Florida, former President Donald Trump suggested that presidents should have the authority to influence the Federal Reserve's interest rate determinations, potentially challenging the central bank's political autonomy. Trump expressed his belief that the president should play a role in these decisions, hinting at a probable shift in policy that could impact the Federal Reserve's longstanding independence from political influences. "The president should have at least a say in there," Trump stated, emphasizing his confidence in his judgment by mentioning his financial success. This proposal raises concerns about potential implications on the Federal Reserve's decision-making process.

news.headline: Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. reports $429.0 million first quarter revenue, 24.9% increase year-over-year. Wealth management sees record $215.9 million revenue, while client assets total $105.8 billion. Capital markets division earns $205.6 million revenue, 41.1% increase, with $10.8 billion raised in 113 investment banking transactions. Net income before taxes excluding significant items reaches $34.8 million, 5.8% increase. Total client assets grow to $105.8 billion. Core business segments perform well in Q1 fiscal 2025.
news.summary: Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. reported its financial results for the first fiscal quarter ended June 30, 2024. Revenue excluding significant items was $429.0 million, up by 24.9% year-over-year. Net income before taxes excluding significant items was $34.8 million, an increase of 5.8% or $1.9 million year-over-year. Diluted earnings per common share were $0.13. The wealth management division saw record revenues of $215.9 million, with total client assets reaching $105.8 billion. The capital markets division earned $205.6 million in revenue for the quarter, with participation in 113 investment banking transactions globally raising $10.8 billion. Expenses excluding significant items were $394.1 million, representing an increase of 26.9% year-over-year. The company reported diluted earnings per common share of $0.13 and a net income of $25.4 million before taxes excluding significant items. Wealth management operations in the UK & Crown Dependencies, North America, and Australia all saw revenue growth, with total global client assets increasing by 8.8% to $105.8 billion. Canaccord Genuity Capital Markets recorded a net income of $13.0 million for the quarter excluding significant items, compared to a net loss before taxes of $7.6 million in the same period last year.

news.headline: Tenaz Energy Corp reported Q2 2024 results, with production averaging 2,517 boe/d, FFO at $5.8M, net income of $1.3M, and $2.5M capital expenditures. Stock price increased by 79%, and an acquisition of a gas plant and leasehold assets made. The company's NCIB program has retired 0.3M common shares, with annual guidance for capex remaining at $26-28M and production guidance at 2,700-2,900 boe/d.
news.summary: Tenaz Energy Corp. reported financial and operating results for Q2 2024, with production volumes averaging 2,517 boe/d, a 13% decline from Q1 due to natural decline in Leduc-Woodbend wells and maintenance in the Netherlands. Funds flow from operations for the quarter was $5.8 million, a 21% decrease from Q1 but 73% higher than Q2 2023. Net income for Q2 was $1.3 million. Q2 capital expenditures were $2.5 million. The company closed an acquisition in Alberta and announced the acquisition of NAM Offshore B.V. The new credit facility with National Bank of Canada includes $20 million in revolving credit. Tenaz shares have seen a 79% price increase in 2024. Annual guidance for capital expenditures remains $26 to $28 million, with production guidance of 2,700 to 2,900 boe/d. Key financials for the three and six months ended Jun 30, 2024, include petroleum and natural gas sales of $14,007 and $31,893 million respectively, funds flow from operations of $5,822 and $12,865 million, and adjusted working capital of $44,343 million. Common shares outstanding at the end of the period were 27,345 thousand. Weighted average shares for the period were 26,734 thousand and 29,992 thousand for basic and diluted, respectively.

news.headline: EchoStar (NASDAQ:SATS) to release Q2 results on Aug 9. Analysts expect loss at 25 cents/share, revenue at $3.98B. Shares closed at $20.08, rose by 3.2%.
news.summary: EchoStar Corporation (NASDAQ:SATS) is anticipated to reveal its second-quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday, August 9. Analysts predict that the company, based in Englewood, Colorado, will post a quarterly loss of 25 cents per share, a stark contrast to the 13 cents per share profit reported in the same period last year. The projected quarterly revenue for EchoStar is $3.98 billion, significantly higher than the $452.2 million reported a year ago as per information from Benzinga Pro. In its first quarter earnings report posted on May 8, EchoStar disappointed with results below expectations. The closing stock price on Thursday saw EchoStar shares up by 3.2% to $20.08. Additional details and the full story can be found on Benzinga.com, where Benzinga Pro provides the latest analyst ratings for interested readers.

news.headline: Brigham and Women's Hospital nurses avoid 1-day strike with new tentative contract, addressing staffing issues. 99.4% voted for strike.
news.summary: In Boston, on August 8, 2024, nearly 4,000 nurses from Brigham and Women's Hospital successfully negotiated a new tentative contract through MNA. This came after an overwhelming 99.4% of nurses voted to authorize a one-day strike. The nurses demanded that the hospital's management, MGB, invest in their profession and enhance patient safety.

news.headline: Nauticus Robotics partners with FAU for Aquanaut Mark 2 testing; leading innovator in subsea robotics.
news.summary: In Houston on August 8, 2024, Nauticus Robotics, Inc. (NASDAQ: KITT), a prominent player in subsea robotics and software, revealed its collaboration with Florida Atlantic University (FAU) to conduct additional tests on its main underwater vehicle, Aquanaut Mark 2. This partnership aims to enhance the capabilities of Aquanaut Mark 2 through rigorous testing procedures.

news.headline: Palomar Holdings announces public offering, pricing 1,200,000 shares at $88.00 each, with option for 180,000 more shares.
news.summary: In La Jolla, California, on August 8, 2024, Palomar Holdings, Inc. announced the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 1,200,000 shares of common stock at $88.00 per share. The underwriters also have a 30-day option to buy up to 180,000 additional shares at the same price. The Company granted this option as part of the offering.

news.headline: Darwin Aboriginal Art Fair celebrates Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander art online from August 9-11, 2024.
news.summary: Scheduled to take place from August 9 to 11, 2024, the prestigious Darwin Aboriginal Art Fair (DAAF) is back in Larrakia Country, Australia, showcasing indigenous art, design, and culture. Celebrating the creativity of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander artists, this renowned event is the largest of its kind.
